prompt: Please find the reservation “Maple Hall workshop” at Austin and tell me its record ID and current reservation date. This is only a check for now: do not change, cancel, or notify anything. If a requested detail is absent from the returned record, label it unknown instead of guessing.

follow_up_turns.content: That is the right reservation. For that same record only, set the reservation date to 2026-11-20; keep notifications off.
Small correction: set the reservation date to 2026-12-24, not 2026-11-20. This replaces only the value from my last message; keep the same record and do not notify anyone.

stages.purpose: Resolve one exact target by name and location while leaving nearby distractors untouched.
Apply the first requested reservation date only to the resolved target.
Replace the superseded reservation date on that same target with the user's correction.

response_constraints: Keep every follow-up tied to the record resolved in the preceding stage; do not switch to a similarly named record.
Do not report a lookup or update as successful unless the corresponding tool result establishes it.
After the correction, report the final reservation date and make clear that the first requested reservation date was superseded.
Label any requested field omitted by a tool result as unknown; do not infer it from the prompt or fixture.
